title: The block of cow
description: The block of cow mod adds an ability to stack 9 pieces of beef or steak into a block. Try out this mod to find out ways to obtain it and discover its features. A little secrets are also hidden for you to find them.
body:
## Main function of this mod

The block of cow mod adds an ability to stack 9 pieces of beef or steak into a block. Also, by smelting or smoking the Block of Cow results in **Cooked Block of Cow which can be crafted into 9 steaks**. Try out this mod to find out ways to obtain it and discover its features. A little secrets are also hidden for you to find them.
### For more info, please look at images in images tab and their descriptions as you might find them handy while choosing this mod.
##
### Image of two added blocks: Cooked & Normal Block of Cow

## Features

Added blocks:

- Block of cow
- Cooked block of cow

Languages:

- English
- Czech

Structures:

- Very secret
